Python

The most beginner-friendly language on the planet. Start here, go anywhere.

// tutorials
// EP. 01
Make Your Computer Talk! 💻 — Print & What is Python?
Learn the basics, understand why Python is like English, and write your first print() command.
// EP. 02
Give Your Computer a MEMORY! 🧠 — What are Variables?
Learn about variables and data storage — the foundation for games keeping score and apps remembering usernames.
// EP. 03
Teach Your Code to Think! 🧠 — If/Else & User Input
Make your code interactive! Learn how to ask questions, get user input, and make decisions using if/else statements.

// who we are

Welcome to Core Code

Your new home for mastering the essential skills of the modern world. Whether you're looking to build your first robot, automate a spreadsheet, or write your first line of code — we've got you covered.

At Core Code, we dive deep into the three pillars of the tech toolkit — giving you everything you need to go from complete beginner to confident builder. We believe great education should be free, fun, and accessible to everyone.

🐍
Python
Learn to write clean, efficient code and build real-world applications from scratch. The perfect first language.
🤖
Arduino
Get hands-on with circuits, sensors, and robotics to bring your ideas to life in the physical world.
📊
Excel
Master data visualization and advanced formulas to work smarter, not harder — and impress anyone.

This is just the beginning. 🚀

We have much more planned for the future — more languages, more projects, more tutorials. Join the community and start building your toolkit today!
